title: Mount Everest Height: 8848.86 Meters & Measurement History
content: Mount Everest's height is not as simple as a single number. Most Nepalese still cite 8,848 meters, the traditional figure taught for decades.

title: Mount Everest - Wikipedia
content: Its height was most recently measured in 2020 through a joint survey by Nepalese and Chinese authorities as 8,848.86 m (29,031 ft 8+1⁄2 in). Mount Everest.
